nasb.text: and they took their daughters for themselves as wives, and gave their own daughters to their sons, and served their gods.

esv.text: And their daughters they took to themselves for wives, and their own daughters they gave to their sons, and they served their gods.

cnv.text: 他們娶他們的女兒作妻子，也把自己的女兒嫁給他們的兒子，並且事奉他們的神。

ccb.text: 跟他们通婚，祭拜他们的神明。
